title: CustomServerMessages
description: This serverside mod lets you edit vanilla messages which are not configurable with forge by default.
body:
This serverside mod lets you edit vanilla messages which are not configurable with forge by default.

 
## Current Messages:

- Join Message
- Leave Message
- Timeout leave message (when timing out serverside)
- Server stopping kick message
- Server starting kick message
- MOTD while server is starting
- Server starting version
- Server starting version hover message 
- Custom Server status 
- Randomized MOTD
- Estimated Server start time in start MOTD, works after first start with this mod
- Kick messages for idle timeout, outdated client/server and spam
- Changable file path for server icon
- Special server icon while starting

## MC Version Support

Everything older than 1.18 will not get new updates

Planned update for 1.20.2
